sources.quote: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live Preview `gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview` ... Input price Free of charge $0.75 (text) $3.00 or $0.005/min (audio) $1.00 or $0.002/min (image/video) Output price (including thinking tokens) Free of charge $4.50 (text) $12.00 or $0.018/min (audio)

notes: Gemini pricing may vary by modality and prompt length; this entry records the cited standard text or text/image/video tier.
